reviews.review_description: Love this. Very educational and entertaining.

I'm always amazed when a singular business can put together a much better app than professional for-profit developers. With freeform exploration of the whole museum,  this is as real as it gets. Wish the quality of the paintings was a little better resolution to see more detail. Otherwise, this app is a home run.

Excellent experience but unfortunately the sound stopped after a couple of minutes and despite trying the three different tour options it didn't return. I'm using S7 Edge with Nougat, July security patch..

reviews.review_title: Very well done! Such a treat!
reviews.review_description: It feels like we are right there. Oh yes!
Good and well done. A bit short but the idea is interesting.

reviews.review_title: Point and click and it auto walks
reviews.review_description: to that location.  Can look around while moving.  Good scale, like you're there inside the building.  The paintings and history are okay too.  Though, quite limited like most VR apps at this time. 5 stars for atmosphere and scale.
By Samsung. Virtual portal for museum paintings, circa-1878.

reviews.review_title: Well done, but not the best graphics
reviews.review_description: Well done virtual museum experience. It's a pity the rendering of the building itself is not realistic. The 3D effect is good, material rendering is poor.
I love this app so much, ill spend alot of time here.

reviews.review_title: Great if you like old paintings
reviews.review_description: Very good immersion. The walking is too slow, even when I turn on fast mode. I wish I could tour the outside of the museum.
I was fascinated. Remarkable. Cool and amazing!
This is an awesome experience. I really wish more museums would offer VR exploration experiences like this!
Truly an innovative way to show what museums could offer to the public.
